title: elymus breviaristatus
intro: Elymus breviaristatus, also known as the Short-beaked Wildrye or Short-beaked Wheatgrass, is a perennial grass native to the northwestern United States and southwestern Canada. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Elymus breviaristatus include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Elymus breviaristatus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
